issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing configuration files or unsupported file types.
Instructions rely on npm and Homebrew, which may not be available on all operating systems, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: Cut 45s ESLint CI step with oxlint
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented eslint-plugin-oxlint flat/recommended config plus oxc-project/oxlint-action with deny-warnings, while baseline only suggests generic ESLint parallelization and caching.

scenarios.name: Pre-commit hook on TypeScript repo
scenarios.rationale: Treatment configures lint-staged with `oxlint --fix` and the documented correctness/suspicious categories in .oxlintrc.json, while baseline defaults to husky+eslint without the speed-critical oxlint pattern.
